---
title: "Research"
page-layout: full
---

My work addresses two core questions about human social behavior:

::: {.research-grid}

::: {.research-card}
![](images/research-intergroup.jpg)

### [Navigating intergroup boundaries, solidarity, and conflict](intergroup-relations.qmd)

Investigating the conditions under which people cooperate across group lines or reinforce status hierarchies.

*Keywords: intergroup relations, hierarchy, status, solidarity, collective action*

[Publications and on-going projects →](intergroup-relations.qmd)
:::

::: {.research-card}
![](images/research-disease.jpg)

### [Social behavior in the context of disease threat](infectious-disease.qmd)

Exploring how people balance the tradeoff between pathogen avoidance and social affiliation.

*Keywords: behavioral immune system, sickness behavior, pathogen management, disease concealment*

[Publications and on-going projects →](infectious-disease.qmd)
:::

:::
